shape_decode: cmp=L (cmplog blocks), vp=_, vpc=_, naive=W (naive resolves) -> I2S-ANTI: input-to-state HURTS relative to plain havoc; value_profile & vpc non-decisive.

hypotheses.label: cmplog solves upstream structural gates and channels the corpus into a deep valid-decode path, starving the shallow target byte of the random mutation plain havoc supplies incidentally

params.definition_size_ratio: median bytes of cmplog corpus seeds that REACH the gate / median bytes of naive corpus seeds that reach the gate
params.definition_target_reach: fraction of cmplog reaching-seeds that take the gate TRUE side / same fraction for naive (the bKGD invalid-color side at L2018)
params.note: structural inequality gate on a single byte with DIFFERENT-SIZED winning vs blocking seeds; byte_freq_ratio/operand_enrichment is INFEASIBLE here (returns no_gate_signature) -> this descriptor measures corpus SCALE + target reach instead of operand bytes

hypotheses.prediction: cmplog's reaching corpus is structurally larger AND less often on the target side than naive's: size_ratio_cmp_over_naive >= 1.5 (cmplog drives big valid IDAT images: 8360-8771B vs naive 375-793B) AND target_reach_ratio_cmp_over_naive < 0.5 (cmplog starved of the high-background-byte flip; naive lucky-hits it). A pure value-substitution anti-mechanism would instead predict size parity with cmplog merely PINNED to a decoy value at the gate offset (size_ratio ~ 1.0), so corpus scale separation rules out the decoy-substitution alternative.
hypotheses.feasibility: BLOCKED on data_realities: on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3 -- libpng has NO on-disk corpus, so neither corpus_size_ratio nor any seed/corpus descriptor can score libpng_4002. This hypothesis is currently UNMEASURABLE for its sole member. The descriptor is recorded for any future libpng corpus capture, but the arbiter must fall through to inconclusive for libpng_4002 today.

hypotheses.label: the gate is an ungradable fixed-offset equality; plain havoc places the literal by random mutation while cmplog diverts energy and leaves its corpus depleted of (pinned away from) the target value at the gate offset

params.gate_offset: little-endian codepoint a==0x05E9 (SHIN): target bytes e9 05; decoy fillers 0x00 / 0xb9 / 0xc2 dominate loser seeds
params.note: fixed-offset VALUE equality gate with comparably-sized seeds -> operand_enrichment applies. Anti orientation => expect NEGATIVE signed_target_enrich (cmplog corpus DEPLETED of target vs naive).

hypotheses.prediction: cmplog's corpus is DEPLETED of the target value 0x05E9 at the gate offset relative to naive: signed_target_enrich < -0.3 (anti). I2S introspection diverts energy without learning the equality, so cmplog under-represents the literal that havoc reaches incidentally. The PRO alternative (I2S substitution helps) would predict signed_target_enrich > +0.3; a no-effect null predicts ~0. The negative sign falsifiably separates anti from pro and from null.
hypotheses.feasibility: MEASURABLE: harfbuzz has on-disk corpus (data_realities) and the 286 reps carry resolving_seeds + blocking_seeds; fixed-offset equality with similar-sized seeds satisfies operand_enrichment scope_limits.

notes.merges: NO merge. The two branches are genuinely DIFFERENT anti-mechanisms that real data CAN discriminate, so they stay separate (per the prior v2 clusters, which I adopt). libpng_4002 = STRUCTURAL corpus channeling (signal lives in corpus SIZE/depth, an inequality gate on different-sized seeds -> operand bytes carry no signal). harfbuzz_5802 = VALUE decoy-pin (signal lives in a fixed-offset equality literal -> operand bytes carry the signal). A single descriptor cannot cover both: byte_freq_ratio is infeasible on the libpng structural gate (data_reality #3), and corpus_size_ratio would be a degenerate ~1.0 on the harfbuzz value gate (no scale separation).
notes.targets: libpng_4002 (libpng, structural/IDAT bKGD), harfbuzz_5802 (harfbuzz, Hebrew SHIN+SIN-DOT compose equality).
notes.reuse: REUSED operand_enrichment (descriptor_key corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset) for the harfbuzz decoy-pin subtype in its ANTI orientation (signed_target_enrich < -0.3) exactly as the prompt directed. Proposed a NEW corpus_size_ratio descriptor (corpus_queue:corpus_size_ratio:median_seed_bytes:per_branch, registry_tool null) for the structural starvation subtype, per the prompt's note that corpus-scale starvation may not be byte-measurable.
caveats: FEASIBILITY GAP: libpng has no on-disk corpus (data_realities: corpora only for curl/harfbuzz/openthread/sqlite3). The corpus_channeling hypothesis is therefore UNMEASURABLE for its only member libpng_4002 today; the arbiter must label it inconclusive unless a libpng corpus is later captured. The descriptor + rule are recorded so the test becomes runnable if that data appears.

G1: each prediction is signed and discriminating -- the decoy-pin test separates anti(<-0.3) from pro(>+0.3) from null(~0); the channeling test separates structural scale-starvation (size>=1.5 AND reach<0.5) from value-substitution (size~1.0).

G2: both measurements are INDEPENDENT of the resolve pattern -- they read the cmplog vs naive CORPUS composition (size / operand bytes), not which fuzzer resolved the branch; we never verify 'naive-resolves' with 'naive-resolves'.

data_realities respected: no seed_lineage I2S-event descriptor (I2S untagged); no byte-alignment on the libpng structural different-sized-seed gate; corpus descriptors scoped to corpus-bearing targets only (which excludes libpng).
